EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Contract for signature [candidate]
EmailTemplate.subject: Alliance Rural & Remote Health - Contract Offer
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
ONE SIGNATURE AND YOU'RE READY TO GO.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Your placement contract is ready for you to review and sign. Please follow the link below to complete the process:
[Link to contract]
Also, please have a read through the attached documents relevant to your placement.
[Link to On Hire Handbook] [Link to CEIS] [Link to Stement for Work Seekers]
If you have any questions at all you can always call us on 07 4998 5550.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
